action.description:
Action for the BroadbandCare environment.

The agent picks an action_type from the allowed set and supplies an
optional payload with any required parameters (e.g. account/transaction IDs
captured from the conversation).

Examples
--------
>>> BroadbandcareAction(action_type="greet")
>>> BroadbandcareAction(action_type="ask_account_id")
>>> BroadbandcareAction(action_type="verify_identity",
...                     payload={"account_id": "ACC123", "dob": "1990-05-01"})
>>> BroadbandcareAction(action_type="update_system",
...                     payload={"account_id": "ACC123", "new_mobile": "9876543210"})

action_type.description: The support action verb. Must be one of: greet, close_ticket, ask_account_id, verify_identity, ask_new_mobile, confirm_update, update_system, show_empathy, ask_transaction_id, verify_payment, activate_service, confirm_resolution, de_escalate, ask_symptom_details, check_line_status, remote_fix, schedule_technician, confirm_fix
action_type.title: Action Type

payload.description: Optional parameters for the action. E.g. {'account_id': 'ACC123', 'new_mobile': '9876543210'}
payload.title: Payload

action.title: BroadbandcareAction

observation.description:
Observation returned after each step in the BroadbandCare environment.

Fields
------
customer_message : str
    What the simulated customer said in response to the agent's action.
system_feedback : str
    Feedback from the mock ISP backend system (empty string if the action
    did not query the backend).
customer_mood : str
    Current emotional state of the customer.
    One of: "cooperative", "neutral", "angry", "hung_up".
customer_patience : int
    Number of patience points remaining (0–3).
    Episode ends with a penalty if this reaches 0.
task_phase : str
    Name of the current task phase / state-machine node.
valid_next_actions : List[str]
    Hint list of legal next action_types the agent may take.
    An agent using this list strictly will learn procedure faster.
episode_score : float
    Cumulative normalised score so far in [0.0, 1.0].
step_count : int
    Number of steps taken so far in this episode.

reward.description: Reward signal from the last action
reward.title: Reward

system_feedback.description: ISP backend system response (empty if no backend query was made).
system_feedback.title: System Feedback

customer_mood.description: Customer emotional state: cooperative | neutral | angry | hung_up
customer_mood.title: Customer Mood

customer_patience.description: Remaining patience points (0–3). Episode ends early at 0.
customer_patience.title: Customer Patience

valid_next_actions.description: Legal next action_types for the agent to choose from.
valid_next_actions.title: Valid Next Actions

step_count.description: Steps taken so far in this episode.
step_count.title: Step Count

observation.title: BroadbandcareObservation

state.description:
Base class for environment state.

Represents internal environment state, separate from observations.

episode_id.description: Unique identifier for the current episode
episode_id.title: Episode Id

step_count.description: Number of steps taken in the current episode
step_count.title: Step Count

state.title: State
